label: Mistral
description: Connect to Mistral's hosted language models via the La Plateforme API using an API key.

form.title: Connect Mistral
form.subtitle: Paste your Mistral API key to start querying hosted models like Mistral Large, Mixtral, and Codestral.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from console.mistral.ai. Takes under a minute — no OAuth flow, no extra setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get a Mistral API key

1. Go to [console.mistral.ai](https://console.mistral.ai) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. Click **API Keys** in the left sidebar.
3. Click **Create new key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Create**.
4. Copy the key immediately — it is shown only once. If you miss it, delete and create a new one.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Keys are scoped to your workspace. If you belong to multiple workspaces, make sure you're in the right one before generating the key.
- You can restrict a key's permissions (read-only vs. full access) from the same panel.
- To revoke access later, return to **API Keys**, find the key, and click **Delete**.
- Free-tier accounts have rate limits; upgrade your plan in **Billing** if you hit quota errors.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at console.mistral.ai → API Keys. The key is shown only once when created.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The model Anton uses by default. You can override this per-request.

fields.name: api_endpoint
fields.label: API Endpoint
fields.description: Override only if you use a self-hosted or regional Mistral endpoint. Leave as-is for La Plateforme.
